cto.title: Merge gate and release confidence
cto.headline: CTO cares that the runtime is complete and the merge gate is safe.
risks: reload the dashboard if a stale snapshot is being shown
cto.ask: Keep merge confidence high and preserve the handoff trail.

vp.title: Quality, security, and health
vp.headline: VP cares that the runtime and logs stay stable.
risks: watch for stale log tails or missing snapshot refresh

director.title: Execution flow and ownership
director.headline: Director cares that the latest checkpoint reflects completion.
risks: avoid stale ownership or orphaned handoff state
director.ask: Keep the final checkpoint aligned to the live tracker.

manager.title: Near-term work and ETA
manager.headline: Manager cares that there is no remaining work in this slice.
manager.ask: Keep the team on the next highest-value task.
